title: Ubiquiti Two-section 12U Rack Cabinet, Wall mount, 700mm, glass door
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-12U-Wall-SW-G is a two-section 19" wall-mounted rack in 12U size, delivered fully assembled and equipped with a glass front door panel , which â just like the removable side panels â can be locked to prevent unauthorized access. The door is factory-set to a left-hand orientation with the option to reverse it. With a depth of 700 mm , the rack allows the installation of networking devices up to 559 mm deep To ensure efficient cooling of active components, the rack is equipped with a pair of fans, keeping total noise levels below 50 dB(A). If you need to back up active devices using, for example, batteries, you will appreciate its above-standard load capacity of 80 kg. The enclosure features an elegant white finish with a powder-coated surface, and the Ubiquiti logo is present on the side panels.
